name: forge_new_connector
description: End-to-end: forge a new connector for any service (web_api, node/TS etc), build real podman MCP image, register in ~/.grok/config.toml (with modern podman field + command), emit high-quality use_*.json TASK for taskmaster /task + list_available_tasks. Uses the production ConnectorForge at /home/nicsins/workdir/connector_forge/connector_forge.py . After: the new MCP tools (e.g. xxx__health_check) + TASK are immediately usable. This is the meta-tool enabling 'instantly turn any need into live podman + /task callable thing'.

service.description: Name of service e.g. 'linear_audit_helper' or 'my_node_api' or 'gamma_doc_helper'

base_url.description: Base for the API if web

language.description: python (default, FastMCP) or node (for TS MCPs like no-proof-deployer)

steps.note: Use canonical workdir/ one (primary per AGENTS)

steps.description: Real execution: generates connector + (py or node) MCP files in generated_connectors/, podman build (real exit 0 image), appends to ~/.grok/config.toml with podman structured, writes use_*.json TASK

steps.note: podman images | grep {{service}}-mcp ; cat ~/.grok/config.toml | grep -A5 mcp_servers.{{service}} ; cat ~/.grok/tasks/use_{{service}}.json ; podman run --rm --entrypoint python3 localhost/{{service}}-mcp:latest -c 'test import health'
Restart/reload MCPs in grok; then search_connected_tools for {{service}} or use taskmaster__list_available_tasks ; invoke via /task {use_{{service}}; health_check} or direct use_tool
New connector + TASK now live, symbiotic, podman isolated, instantly available for future TASKs. Update connector_index too via the run.

source: Created by ForgeImplementer for GitHub issue #3 wiring + research vision. Uses real forge_and_wire_to_podman_mcp_add (enhanced with language, modern toml, robust server, clean TASK names)
podman_mcp: uses the forge itself + produces new ones
